prompt.content: Update the C9 lesson plan with lesson date, lesson outline, and homework assignment, adapting the journal lesson outline to request other metaphorical quotes from the last 8 pages of the chapter. The assignment should ask for the meaning of the text, the connotations of the word or phrase, and how the word choice reveals something about a character. Include the page numbers of the text excerpts.
